Zd=(function(...)return{...},tb('#',...)end)local q;q=(function(ea,kd,dd)if kd>dd then return end return ea[kd],q(ea,kd+1,dd)end)local function Xe(Wd,Ha,Ad,Ba)local of,Y,Lc,Se,tc,t_,Gb,Ud,Df,la,oe,Ae,X,lf,Id,df,de,oc,Hd,mb,f_,dc,Cf,y;Id,Lc={},function(rb,i_,xb)Id[i_]=_b(xb,54547)-_b(rb,54873)return Id[i_]end;oc=Id[-29010]or Lc(20050,-29010,99272)while oc~=22566 do if oc<=35681 then if oc<17707 then if oc<11928 then if oc>=6956 then if oc>=9821 then if oc<10410 then if oc>10006 then oc,tc=Id[-10885]or Lc(17677,-10885,98345),mb continue elseif oc>9898 then if y-65536;Hd=Gb;tc=Ha[Hd+1];dc=tc[60290];Df=Rb(dc);Wd[uc(Se[42591],233)]=se_(tc,Df);of,mb,oc,la=1,6,Id[10987]or Lc(47112,10987,98622),(dc)+5 end elseif oc>11371 then oc>8621 then if oc>=9326 then if oc>9326 then df+=Se[64787];oc=Id[21180]or Lc(50139,21180,37455)else df+=1;oc=Id[29557]or Lc(28918,29557,3482)end else if(of>=0 and mb>la)or((of<0 or of~=of)and ce(1952,9681,2976)while Jb~=30060 do if Jb>=42599 then if Jb>63072 then Jb,he=Qf[-5291]or ce(-5291,3289,19682),Gf(he)elseif Jb>=56152 then if Jb>56152 then Jb=Qf[15286]or _a(he,0)else return q(Fe,2,qe)end end end end return se_(Yb,La)end)local fb local jc,He,cd,ta;jc={};ta,He={},function(ia,Fb,Pa)ta[Fb]=_b(Pa,43394)-_b(ia,42476)return ta[Fb]end;cd=ta[-16553]or He(3760,-16553,6919)repeat if cd>=0.64266817838246415*26460 then if cd>=44409-1502 then if cd<=14485+28422 then cd,jc[1]=16015-1054,0 else cd,Ka=ta[12576]or He(22261,12576,24541),le continue end else fb,Cd,cd=jc[2],function()local Tf,P,ye,kb;ye={};Tf,kb=function(Tc,K,Zc)kb[K]=_b(Zc,49566)-_b(Tc,24424)return kb[K]end,{};P=kb[-19327]or Tf(39626,-19327,97060)while P~=939813492/16017 do if
